channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: War breaking news. Iran sent response to US proposal: 'Stop war and maritime security' - Il Sole 24 ORE
item.description: War breaking news. Iran sent response to US proposal: 'Stop war and maritime security' Il Sole 24 ORE

item.title: New Delhi gears up for mega India-Africa Summit after a decade; spotlight on defence, energy, capacity building - Rising Kashmir
item.description: New Delhi gears up for mega India-Africa Summit after a decade; spotlight on defence, energy, capacity building Rising Kashmir

item.title: Australia's right-wing One Nation party scores historic parliamentary win
item.description: One Nation gains its first seat in the lower house, in a by-election seen as a key test for the populist party.

item.title: Dissent Grips Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool As Bengal Election Fallout Exposes Cracks Within
item.description: Several party leaders have publicly spoken out against Mamata and Abhishek's Banerjee's leadership of the party, after the TMC suffered a massive defeat against the BJP in Bengal.

item.title: Gelatin sticks found along PM Modi’s convoy, half hour before he passed by
item.description: Police have also detained a suspect who made a call to the police control room at around 7:30 a.m. threatening to trigger explosions near HAL Airport and the Art of Living premises during the Prime Minister’s visit.

item.title: Sathya Sai Seva Samithi volunteers distribute free drinking water to train passengers at Duvvada
FMCG companies bracing for another round of price increases amid inflation
item.description: While the companies have already hiked prices by 3%-5%, executives indicate further increase citing inflationary pressure arising from volatile crude oil prices, higher logistics costs, currency depreciation, and disruptions in global supply chains amid geopolitical tensions

item.title: Karnataka is No 1 in revenue, panchayat services, claims Priyank Kharge
item.description: The Minister was launching a large-scale distribution drive for revenue department benefits at Dr. S.M. Pandit Rangamandir in Kalaburagi

item.title: DW News. . Around the world, governments are moving to block prediction‑market platforms, calling them illegal and addictive gambling. The pushback comes as people bet real money on wars, elections and other global events - with these markets exploding - facebook.com
item.description: DW News. . Around the world, governments are moving to block prediction‑market platforms, calling them illegal and addictive gambling. The pushback comes as people bet real money on wars, elections and other global events - with these markets exploding facebook.com

item.title: Intel CEO who won over Donald Trump and Elon Musk now needs a breakthrough
item.description: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan is entering his second year with renewed optimism, securing interest from tech giants like Apple and Tesla, and seeing his stock reach record highs. Despite past struggles in AI and manufacturing, Tan is focused on rebuilding internal leadership and leveraging his network to drive the company's resurgence.

item.title: PM Modi assures more support to Telangana, asks CM Revanth to collaborate with him
item.description: PM Narendra Modi inaugurates or lays foundation stone for Zaheerabad Industrial Park (National Investment and Manufacuting Zone), IOC terminal at Malkapur, multi-tracking of railway line between Kazipet and Vijayawada and PM Mitra Park in Warangal

item.title: Tamil Nadu government formation LIVE: TN Assembly to convene first session; Speaker election on May 12
item.description: Former T.N. Chief Minister Stalin reacts sharply to Mr. Vijay's remarks that DMK government had left State treasury empty with debt burden of ₹10 lakh crore

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
item.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

item.title: Pimco warns Iran war could lead Federal Reserve to raise rates - Crypto Briefing
item.description: Pimco warns Iran war could lead Federal Reserve to raise rates Crypto Briefing

item.title: Why Your Grocery Store Has So Many Sparkling Waters
item.description: Walk down the beverage aisle and you'll find dozens of sparkling water brands competing for your attention. It looks like saturation, but it's actually a sign of a category in the middle of a massive shift away from sugary sodas and toward healthier, zero-sugar alternatives. Spindrift's CEO says there's a clear path to $1 billion in sales. Nixie's founder says taste is everything. And a venture investor says the smar

item.title: What Happens To Your Body If You Drink Green Tea For 2 Weeks? A Harvard-Trained Doctor Explains
item.description: A gastroenterologist explains how drinking green tea regularly may support liver health, metabolism and focus.

item.title: Stories of those killed in a single day of Israeli strikes on Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes have killed at least 39 people in a single day of attacks across Lebanon during a so-called ‘ceasefire.’

item.title: Hyderabad: Modi Attacks Congress, TMC, Says Bengal Rejected Dangerous Model - Deccan Chronicle
item.description: Hyderabad: Modi Attacks Congress, TMC, Says Bengal Rejected Dangerous Model Deccan Chronicle

item.title: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak revives traumatic memories of Covid-19 lockdowns at sea for Diamond Princess passengers
item.description: Former cruise passengers who lived through Covid-era lockdowns aboard ships say the unfolding situation feels hauntingly familiar.

item.title: PM Modi calls on Indians to use petrol, diesel with ‘great restraint’ amid West Asia crisis
First passengers fly home from virus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

item.title: Fed Chair Nominee Kevin Warsh Disagrees With Jerome Powell on This Key Fed Policy Supporting the Stock Market (Hint: Not Rate Cuts) - AOL.com
item.description: Fed Chair Nominee Kevin Warsh Disagrees With Jerome Powell on This Key Fed Policy Supporting the Stock Market (Hint: Not Rate Cuts) AOL.com

item.title: ‘Ukraine has momentum in war with Russia’
item.description: ‘Ukraine has momentum in war with Russia’

item.title: How Worried Should Indians Be About Hantavirus? Doctors Explain
item.description: Doctors explain that the virus is not commonly spread from one person to another. This is one of the biggest reasons experts are not treating it as a large public health threat like COVID-19.

item.title: Air India has terminated over 1,000 staff in last 3 years for ethical breaches: CEO
item.description: Flagging that hundreds of employees are terminated every year due to non-compliance, Mr. Wilson has also emphasised that the staff need to act in the right way even when others are not looking

item.title: Qatari gas shipment clears Strait of Hormuz after Pakistan-Iran talks
item.description: Tanker carrying LNG from Qatar throws energy lifeline to Islamabad

item.title: Can Asian economies cope with the fallout from the Iran war?
item.description: Fuel costs, inflation and debt pressures are testing Asian economies.

item.title: 'Aap Mere Se Hi Judo': PM Modi, Revanth Reddy Share Light Moment In Hyderabad
item.description: PM Modi said it was better for Revanth Reddy to join him as Telangana would lose half of what it has if the Centre cooperates with him in the state's development.

item.title: Evening news wrap: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay chairs first Secretariat meeting; Iran sends response to US via Pakistan and more
item.description: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay convened his inaugural Secretariat meeting, focusing on law and order ahead of the Assembly session. Bengaluru experienced a security scare with gelatine sticks found near PM Modi's event venue. Iran responded to a US proposal via Pakistan amidst Strait of Hormuz tensions. Vijay's swearing-in, beginning with Vande Mataram, sparked political debate.

item.title: AI Wins Have Alphabet Poised to Become World’s Biggest Company
item.description: Over the past year, Alphabet Inc. has gone from an artificial intelligence afterthought to the one firm in the market with dominant positions in nearly every aspect of the technology. Now it’s on the brink of overtaking AI chip giant Nvidia Corp. as the largest company in the world.

item.title: Iran war could prompt Federal Reserve to raise rates, Pimco says
item.description: Bond giant and Franklin Templeton warn in interviews with FT against cuts in borrowing costs

item.title: Official JDownloader site served malware to Windows and Linux users between May 6 and May 7 - Security Affairs
item.description: Official JDownloader site served malware to Windows and Linux users between May 6 and May 7 Security Affairs

item.title: Ganesh Kumar alleges UDF-BJP deal in Pathanapuram
item.description: Ganesh Kumar pointed to a significant and ‘suspicious’ drop in the BJP’s vote share as primary evidence of cross-voting intended to consolidate the anti-LDF front

item.title: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security - News On AIR
item.description: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security News On AIR

item.title: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical security vulnerability in Ollama that, if successfully exploited, could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to leak its entire process memory. The out-of-bounds read flaw, which likely impacts over 300,000 servers globally, is tracked as CVE-2026-7482 (CVSS score: 9.1). It has been codenamed Bleeding Llama by Cyera. Ollama is a

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposal to end war via mediator Pakistan
item.description: According to the proposal, initial negotiations will focus on ending hostilities.

item.title: Pune ink attack: Police book devotional preacher and his supporters; NCP (SP) Leader Vikas Lawande meets Sharad Pawar - Mid-day
item.description: Pune ink attack: Police book devotional preacher and his supporters; NCP (SP) Leader Vikas Lawande meets Sharad Pawar Mid-day

item.title: Bogota International Book Fair 2026: India As Guest Of Honour Sparks Colombia Craze
item.description: FILBo 2026: The event also saw strong engagement from children and students.

item.title: ChatGPT's New 'Duty To Warn': Why Your AI Confessor Is No Longer Private
item.description: OpenAI's Trusted Contact alerts a real person if ChatGPT detects severe distress or self-harm risk

item.title: SK Hynix flooded with unprecedented offers from big tech firms to secure chip supplies
item.description: Global tech giants are making unprecedented offers to SK Hynix. They want to invest in new production lines and fund expensive equipment purchases. This is to secure vital memory chips. Demand for these chips is surging due to the artificial intelligence boom. SK Hynix is cautious about these deals. The company is reviewing various approaches to secure long-term supply agreements.
